canonical_question: What is the OWASP Top 10 checklist with code examples?

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: OWASP Top 10 2021 release (Sep 2021) -- 3 new categories, 4 renamed, major reordering

constraints: OWASP Top 10 is a risk-awareness document, not a compliance standard -- passing all 10 does not mean your application is secure
Current official version is OWASP Top 10:2021 (released September 2021); a 2025 draft exists but is not yet ratified
Focuses on web applications only -- mobile, API, and cloud have separate OWASP projects (Mobile Top 10, API Top 10, Cloud-Native Top 10)
Automated scanners (ZAP, Burp) only detect a subset of the Top 10 -- A04 Insecure Design and A08 Integrity Failures require manual review
Never rely solely on client-side validation -- all security controls must be enforced server-side
